convars.name: cl_ignorepackets

convars.name: cl_interp_parallel
convars.description: Run interpolation in parallel for entities with no children.

convars.name: cl_interp_ratio
convars.description: Set number of client simulation interpolation ticks.

convars.name: cl_interp_simulationvars
convars.description: Interpolate LATCH_SIMULATION_BIT vars if interpolation interval is greater than animation interval

convars.name: cl_interp_threadmodeticks
convars.description: Additional interpolation ticks to use when interpolating with threaded engine mode set.

convars.name: cl_interpolate_report
convars.description: Enable to show interpolation profile timing

convars.name: cl_inventory_radial_immediate_select

convars.name: cl_inventory_radial_tap_to_cycle
convars.description: In inventory selection radials. Select weapons the moment the cursor highlights them. Otherwise, only select the selected item on exit.

convars.name: cl_invites_only_friends

convars.name: cl_invites_only_mainmenu

convars.name: cl_ironsight_usecrosshaircolor

convars.name: cl_mute_enemy_team

convars.name: cl_mute_player_after_reporting_abuse

convars.name: cl_net_buffer_ticks_use_interp

convars.name: cl_net_showevents
convars.description: Dump game events to console (1=client only, 2=all).

convars.name: cl_new_user_phase
convars.description: 0: Not Started, 1: Needs Training, 2: Training Complete, -1: Disabled

convars.name: cl_observed_bot_crosshair
convars.description: Control the crosshair shown when observing a bot. 0: Show player crosshair. 1: Show player crosshair only when bot can be taken over, otherwise show default.. 2: Always show default crosshair for bots.

convars.name: cl_panel_freeze_time_after_press

convars.name: cl_phys_assume_fixed_tick_interval

convars.name: cl_phys_debug_callback_entities
convars.description: Print all entities that get touch callbacks. Each entity is printed only once.

convars.name: cl_phys_sleep_enable

If you increase this significantly, ragdoll positions on your client may be dramatically wrong, but it won't affect other clients

convars.name: cl_random_taser_bone_y

convars.description: Draw approximate memory use at top of screen

convars.description: Show current tick/time values.  Bitmask:  1='render time'  2='GameTime'   4=time of predicted entities  8=offset of predicted entities    (-1 means 'everything')

convars.description: The length of the window of trailing counter-strafe attempts considered during input automation detection.

convars.name: sv_auto_cstrafe_kick
convars.description: Whether or not to kick players when counter-strafe input automation is detected.

convars.name: sv_auto_cstrafe_logging
convars.description: 0: never, 1: every time counter-strafe input automation is detected, 2: every counter-strafe

convars.name: sv_auto_cstrafe_lower_overlap_pct_threshold
convars.description: The percentage of overlapping attempts in the attempt window below which input automation detection is triggered at the success threshold.

convars.name: sv_auto_cstrafe_min_attempts
convars.description: The minimum number of counter-strafe attempts required for input automation detection. The player must be moving more than 135.2 units/s for their counter-strafe to be considered an attempt. An attempt is either considered a success (counter-strafing took place within a single tick), an overlap (both directions were held for 1+ ticks) or an underlap (neither direction was held for 1+ ticks).

convars.name: sv_auto_cstrafe_sequence_length
convars.description: The length of sequential counter-strafe attempts evaluated relative to the success threshold. Input automation detection considers the best sequence within the larger attempt window.

convars.name: sv_auto_cstrafe_success_threshold
convars.description: The minimum number of successful counter-strafes within a best sequence that will trigger input automation detection. The number of successes that trigger input automation detection is interpolated between the success threshold and a 'perfect' sequence (all counter-strafes in a sequence are successes), depending on the player's percentage of overlapping counter-strafe attempts.

convars.name: sv_auto_cstrafe_upper_overlap_pct_threshold
convars.description: The percentage of overlapping attempts in the attempt window below which input automation detection is triggered when all counter-strafes in a sequence are successes.
